---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in package behavior or repository operations
title: "[BUG] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

Describe the problem clearly.

## Reproduction

Provide reproducible steps and input data characteristics.

## Expected behavior

What should happen?

## Actual behavior

What happened instead?

## Environment

- OS:
- R version:
- Package version / commit SHA:

## Evidence

- Logs / error messages:
- Minimal code snippet or command:

## Notes on numerical behavior

If this affects linking/calibration results, include before/after metrics.
